author: gb9t
content: Iter 85 result: drivers/md/dm-clone.md (block-level cloning - dm-clone-target.c ~2208 + dm-clone-metadata.c ~1020; per-region 64KB origin→dest CoW + per-bio bio_prison cell + bg hydration kthread + persistent metadata via dm-bufio + per-region monotonic Hydrated state + RW/RO/FAIL modes + dmsetup hydration_threshold/_batch_size + delete_old_origin after 100% hydrated) + virt/kvm/x86-host-irq.md (VMX posted-interrupt processing - posted_intr.c ~319 lines; per-vCPU 64-byte aligned PiDesc with PIR/control(ON/SN/NV/NDST) + per-source IPI delivery via test_and_set_pir + IOMMU IRTE.posted=1 direct PIR-write + per-vCPU pre_block/post_block for halted-vCPU + POSTED_INTR_WAKEUP_VECTOR + sync_pir_to_irr at vmenter + NDST cross-CPU migrate). 120 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-bow.md (CoW for over-the-air updates) + virt/kvm/x86-mtf.md (Monitor Trap Flag + single-step debugging).
